channel.title: ls on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in ls on IT notes

item.title: LS_COLORS
item.description: To remove the blinking of symbolic links when doing ls in Linux: LS_COLORS="ln=35" export LS_COLORS That will set the ln=35 symbolic links to color purple. Params for LS_COLORS: di Directory fi File ln Symbolic Link pi Fifo file so Socket file bd Block (buffered) special file cd Character (unbuffered) special file or Symbolic Link pointing to a non-existent file (orphan) mi Non-existent file pointed to by a symbolic link (visible when you type ls -l) ex File which is executable (ie.
